calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-13-2005 Off Calendar

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-06-2005 Reset To Dec-13-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Kathy Kollehner.
Petitioner: Norway Amataga, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
After hearing of the Petition, the matter is continued to Dec. 13, 2005 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for proof of Resident of San Francisco County.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-04-2005 Off Calendar
